mapper.sql: team_number, client_employee_pk, product_pk, product_name, departure_date, days, receivable, receivable_comment, adult_count, adult_cost, special_count, special_cost, fy, other_cost, other_cost_comment, comment, passenger_captain, independent_flg, confirm_flg, confirm_date, budget_confirm_file, air_ticket_cost, operate_flg, product_cost, treat_comment, product_value, lock_flg, name_confirm_status, receivable_first_flg, cancel_flg, do_confirm_date, as_adult_flg, product_model, assistant_number, sale, hotel_comment, pk, create_user, update_user, final_type, raise_money, raise_comment, reduce_money, reduce_comment, complain_money, complain_reason, complain_solution, final_status, final_confirm_file, final_voucher_file, product_manager, create_time, update_time, standard_flg, final_receivable, final_receivable_comment

client_employee_pk,

mapper.update:
update sale_order
team_number = #{team_number,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
client_employee_pk = #{client_employee_pk,jdbcType=CHAR},
product_pk = #{product_pk,jdbcType=CHAR},
product_name = #{product_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
departure_date = #{departure_date,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
days = #{days,jdbcType=INTEGER},
receivable = #{receivable,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
receivable_comment = #{receivable_comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
adult_count = #{adult_count,jdbcType=INTEGER},
adult_cost = #{adult_cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
special_count = #{special_count,jdbcType=INTEGER},
special_cost = #{special_cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
fy = #{fy,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
other_cost = #{other_cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
other_cost_comment = #{other_cost_comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
passenger_captain = #{passenger_captain,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
independent_flg = #{independent_flg,jdbcType=CHAR},
confirm_flg = #{confirm_flg,jdbcType=CHAR},
confirm_date = #{confirm_date,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
budget_confirm_file = #{budget_confirm_file,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
air_ticket_cost = #{air_ticket_cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
operate_flg = #{operate_flg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_cost = #{product_cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
treat_comment = #{treat_comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_value = #{product_value,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lock_flg = #{lock_flg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name_confirm_status = #{name_confirm_status,jdbcType=CHAR},
receivable_first_flg = #{receivable_first_flg,jdbcType=CHAR},
cancel_flg = #{cancel_flg,jdbcType=CHAR},
do_confirm_date = #{do_confirm_date,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
as_adult_flg = #{as_adult_flg,jdbcType=CHAR},
product_model = #{product_model,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assistant_number = #{assistant_number,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sale = #{sale,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hotel_comment = #{hotel_comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pk = #{pk,jdbcType=CHAR},
create_user = #{create_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{update_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
final_type = #{final_type,jdbcType=CHAR},
raise_money = #{raise_money,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
raise_comment = #{raise_comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reduce_money = #{reduce_money,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
reduce_comment = #{reduce_comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
complain_money = #{complain_money,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
complain_reason = #{complain_reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
complain_solution = #{complain_solution,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
final_status = #{final_status,jdbcType=CHAR},
final_confirm_file = #{final_confirm_file,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
final_voucher_file = #{final_voucher_file,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_manager = #{product_manager,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
standard_flg = #{standard_flg,jdbcType=CHAR},
final_receivable = #{final_receivable,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
final_receivable_comment = #{final_receivable_comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where pk = #{pk,jdbcType=CHAR}
